memory-consolidation.note: 3 backends (LanceDB, SQLite, hybrid) for 9 GitHub stars. Consolidate into one canonical similarity engine. Neural and intelligence both duplicate pattern-search — merge into @monomind/memory or delete.

hooks-architecture-unify.note: Two parallel hook architectures: .claude/helpers CJS (actual runtime) vs @monomind/hooks TS (library). TS planning/subgraph/synthesis subsystems are orphaned. Either wire them into CJS pipeline or delete them.

agent-definitions-trim.note: Trimmed from 127 to 36 agent .md files. Deleted 91 agent files + 17 macOS resource forks. All 13 router TASK_AGENTS slugs still covered. Kept: 6 core, 8 engineering, 6 GitHub, 4 SPARC, 4 hive-mind, 4 specialized, 2 templates, 1 design, 1 testing. Deleted: org-generated (20), niche engineering (15), reengineer-squad (9), niche testing (8), github wrappers (6), specialized (13), marketing (5), optimization (5), hive-mind generic (3), consensus (2), duplicates (5).

guidance-right-size.note: Trimmed from 8,383 to 851 lines (90% reduction). Deleted 10 files: analyzer.ts (3,194), compiler.ts, retriever.ts, persistence.ts, headless.ts, hooks.ts, ledger.ts, optimizer.ts, proof.ts, crypto-utils.ts. Kept: gates.ts (392), types.ts (435), index.ts (24). CLI guidance command gracefully handles missing submodules. Build clean.

hive-mind-right-size.note: Deleted 5 CLI command files (1,135 lines): hive-mind.ts, hive-mind-comms.ts, hive-mind-helpers.ts, hive-mind-ops.ts, hive-mind-spawn.ts. Removed registration from commands/index.ts. MCP tools version (1,361 lines in hive-mind-tools.ts) remains — it's the one actually wired into mcp-client.ts. Updated CLAUDE.md command count 41->40. Build clean, 677 tests pass.

security-monofence-merge.note: @monomind/security is a 272-line utility masquerading as a package. monofence-ai is unclear guardrails middleware. Merge into one honest module or inline the 272 lines where they're used.

prompt-engineering-audit.note: 91 MB of prompt engineering in .claude/ — nearly half the volume of actual TypeScript. Audit .claude/commands/ and .claude/skills/ for dead weight. Remove skills that are never invoked. Ensure prompt files don't ship in npm package.

routing-confidence-verify.note: Verified with 6 diverse prompts: scores range 0.86-0.939, all 6 distinct. Pure match-count signal (without feedback file): range 0.82-0.92, all distinct. Formula base + min(0.10, matchedKw*0.02) works correctly. route-handler.cjs:131 uses erRule.score clamped [0.70, 0.98] with 0.85 fallback, not hardcoded 0.90. -1 point: per-slug spread modest since most prompts match 1-3 keywords.

prior_phases.phase1: 22 areas converged — deleted 27k lines of stubs, commit 31961cd5
prior_phases.phase2: 14 areas converged — wired D-grade layers to consumers, commit 6b890570
prior_phases.phase3_trigger: Unbiased external feedback identified: 3 great things (monograph, init, audit itself), OK middle (memory, hooks, monobrowse, routing), honest problems (prompt bloat, hive-mind fiction, guidance over-engineering, security masquerading)
